responses.question_text: How important are each of these factors when choosing a body wash?
responses.raw_answer: {"Cleansing effectiveness": 5, "Moisturization / skin hydration": 5, "Fragrance / scent quality": 4, "Gentleness on skin": 5, "Value for money": 4, "Innovation / uniqueness": 3, "Brand trust and reputation": 5, "Convenience / ease of use": 4}
responses.reasoning: Sensitive skin and ingredient safety drive highest importance on cleansing, moisturization, gentleness, and brand trust; fragrance and value are important but less so; innovation and convenience moderate.

responses.question_text: Now that you've seen all 5 concepts, please rank them from most to least appealing. Pick your top 3.
responses.raw_answer: ["Dove Night Wash", "Dove Skip", "Dove 60-Second Body Spray", "Dove Skin ID", "Dove Yours & Mine"]
responses.reasoning: Based on prior answers, Dove Night Wash and Dove Skip had higher interest and fit ratings (4 and 3-4 respectively) with strong appeal for soothing floral scents and moisturizing claims; Dove 60-Second Body Spray was moderately appealing but concerns about price and skin safety lowered preference; Dove Skin ID and Yours & Mine were less favored due to skepticism about personalization, price, and skin sensitivity risks.
